page_content:
Prerequisite: EDHD210, EDHD220, and EDSP211.

Corequisite: EDHD425; and corequisite: EDHD419 or EDSP420. Restriction: Must be enrolled in Professional Early Childhood/Early Childhood Special Education Program; and minimum cumulative GPA of 2.75.

EDHD315 Reading in Early Childhood Classroom: Instruction and Materials Part II (3 Credits)

This course builds on the theories and teaching strategies of EDHD314. Students will focus on teaching of reading and writing to primary grade students.
